title: THERAPEUTIC MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: WOLF PACK CONSULTING AND THERAPEUTIC SERVICE THERAPEUTIC MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mental health services in offices, the community, and at home. Providers collaborate with individuals and families to assess strengths and needs, natural supports, general and cultural identity. Assessments provide a foundational plan for the ongoing individualized work and support offered. 16365 NW Twin Oaks Drive Suite 200 Beaverton, OR 97006 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-8pm by appointment Email (503) 828-3402 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 828-3402 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan (OHP) and some private insurance DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, health insurance card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: MAX Blue Line, TriMet bus lines 48 and 67 Services: Family Counseling Individual Counseling Parent Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WOLF PACK CONSULTING AND THERAPEUTIC SERVICE
